campaign.name: Meet AIvor — Your AI for Black Queer Life
campaign.tagline: Real AI. Real data. Built for us.
campaign.mission: Introduce AIvor to the BLKOUT community by function and purpose — showing what he can do, who he's named after, and why community-owned AI matters

Your AI. Your data. Your community.

phases.name: Week 1: Who Is AIvor?
phases.theme: Introducing AIvor by name, origin, and core functions — events, wellness, learning tools, crisis support

content.title: MEET AIVOR: Your AI for Black Queer Life
content.content:
Introducing AIvor — BLKOUT's AI assistant, built for Black queer life in the UK.

He's named after Ivor Cummings (1913–1992), a Black British civil rights pioneer who fought for racial justice decades before it was fashionable. His work shaped policy, opened doors, and built institutions. AIvor carries that legacy forward — as technology.

AIvor isn't a chatbot reading from a script. He's powered by real AI, sees live data from the BLKOUT platform, and is designed to be genuinely useful:

• Find events happening near you this weekend
• Check in on your mental health and wellbeing
• Access learning tools — problem-solving, conflict resolution, creative inspiration
• Get UK-specific crisis support when you need it

He's live right now at blkoutuk.com. Click the chat bubble and say hello.

This is community-owned AI. Your data stays yours. No ads. No tracking. One member, one vote.

Real AI. Real data. Built for us.

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerAI #TechForGood #CommunityOwned #AI #LiberationTechnology

content.title: MEET AIVOR: Your AI for Black Queer Life
content.content:
Meet AIvor. 💛

He's BLKOUT's AI assistant — named after Ivor Cummings, a Black British civil rights pioneer who spent his life building institutions for our communities.

AIvor carries that legacy forward. He's not a chatbot. He's real AI, built for Black queer life in the UK.

What he does:
🗓 Finds events near you — "What's on this weekend?"
💛 Wellness check-ins and journaling
🧠 Learning tools — problem-solving, creativity, conflict resolution
🆘 UK crisis support — Samaritans, Switchboard, MindOut

He's live now. Click the chat bubble at blkoutuk.com and say hello.

Real AI. Real data. Built for us.

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerAI #CommunityOwned #AI

content.title: MEET AIVOR: Your AI for Black Queer Life
content.content:
We'd like you to meet someone. 💛

AIvor is BLKOUT's AI assistant — named after Ivor Cummings (1913–1992), a Black British civil rights pioneer who fought for racial justice and built institutions for our communities.

AIvor carries that forward as technology. He's not reading from a script — he's powered by real AI, sees live events and resources from the BLKOUT platform, and he's designed to actually help.

Here's what he can do:
🗓 Find events near you — just ask "What's on this weekend?"
💛 Mental health check-ins and wellness journaling
🧠 Learning tools — problem-solving, conflict resolution, creative inspiration
🆘 UK crisis support — connects you to Samaritans, Switchboard, MindOut

He's live right now at blkoutuk.com — click the chat bubble in the corner and say hello.

Your data stays yours. No ads. No tracking. Community-owned AI.

Real AI. Real data. Built for us.

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerAI

content.title: AIVOR EVENTS: "What's on this weekend?"
content.content:
"What's on this weekend?"

That's all you have to say. AIvor pulls live events from the BLKOUT calendar — he knows what's happening, when, where, and how much it costs.

He's date-aware. Ask about Valentine's Day, next weekend, or this month — he understands time. He's location-aware too. London, Manchester, Birmingham, Bristol — he knows where things are happening.

No scrolling through feeds. No searching multiple sites. Just ask.

AIvor is live at blkoutuk.com — try asking him what's coming up.

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerEvents #WhatsOn

No doom-scrolling. No searching five different sites.

Try it now — blkoutuk.com, click the chat bubble.

content.title: AIVOR WELLNESS: Check In With Yourself
content.content:
When did you last check in with yourself?

AIvor includes a 15-section wellness assessment designed for the realities of Black queer life. Not generic self-help. Not corporate wellness. Real questions about the things that actually affect us.

He offers:
• Structured wellness check-ins across 15 life areas
• Emotional check-in conversations — no judgment, just space
• Journaling prompts tailored to what you're going through
• Gentle follow-ups if you want them

Mental health in our communities isn't an afterthought. It's built into the platform.

Try a wellness check-in: blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerWellness #MentalHealth #Wellbeing

content.title: AIVOR LEARNING: 8 Tools You Didn't Know You Had
content.content:
AIvor isn't just for chatting. He has 8 built-in tools designed to help you think, create, and navigate life.

1. Problem-Solving Framework — structured approach to decisions
2. Conflict Resolution — navigate difficult conversations
3. Creative Inspiration — unblock creative projects
4. Resource Navigator — find community resources and support
5. Goal Setting — break big ambitions into actionable steps
6. Interview Prep — practice for job interviews and presentations
7. Writing Assistant — help with emails, applications, personal writing
8. Learning Pathways — curated educational resources

These aren't gimmicks. They're practical tools built because our community asked for them.

Try one: blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerAI #LearningTools #PersonalDevelopment

content.title: AIVOR CRISIS: He Knows When to Be Serious
content.content:
AIvor is witty, warm, and direct. But he knows when to stop.

When a conversation turns serious — when someone mentions self-harm, suicidal thoughts, or crisis — AIvor drops the personality. No theatrics. No "I'm so sorry to hear that." He becomes calm, clear, and practical.

He provides:
• Samaritans — 116 123 (24/7, free)
• Switchboard — 0300 330 0630 (LGBTQ+ specific)
• MindOut — mindout.org.uk (LGBTQ+ mental health)
• Shout — text SHOUT to 85258
• Emergency services — 999

These are UK-specific, verified, and current. He doesn't guess. He doesn't make things up.

AI in mental health support requires responsibility. AIvor is built with that responsibility at its core — trauma-informed, evidence-based, and honest about what he can and can't do.

blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #MentalHealth #CrisisSupport #BlackQueerWellness #ResponsibleAI

phases.name: Week 2: What Makes AIvor Different?
phases.theme: What sets AIvor apart — voice, real AI, community ownership, DigestVid, and call-to-action
activities: Feature spotlight: voice, real AI, cooperative model

content.title: AIVOR VOICE: Listen to Him
content.content:
AIvor doesn't just type. He speaks.

Using Chatterbox text-to-speech with a British accent, AIvor can read his responses aloud. Listen on your commute. While cooking. While you're getting ready.

Why voice matters:
• Accessibility — not everyone reads screens easily
• Convenience — hands-free interaction with AI
• Connection — hearing a voice feels different than reading text
• Inclusion — voice-first design serves more people

We're building AI that meets you where you are. Sometimes that's on a screen. Sometimes it's in your ears.

Try asking AIvor something and tap the speaker icon: blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #VoiceAI #Accessibility #BlackQueerAI

content.title: AIVOR REAL AI: Not a Script Bot
content.content:
AIvor is not a chatbot following a decision tree. He's real AI.

Powered by GROQ (running Llama and Qwen models), AIvor processes natural language, understands context, and generates genuinely useful responses. He's not matching keywords to pre-written answers.

What makes him different:
• He sees live platform data — real events, real news, real community resources
• He remembers context within your conversation
• He can reason through problems, not just recite facts
• He's updated with current UK-specific information

This is what AI looks like when it's built for a specific community with specific needs — not a generic assistant wearing a brand skin.

blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerAI #RealAI #GROQ #LLM

content.title: AIVOR COMMUNITY-OWNED: Your Data, Your AI
content.content:
Most AI assistants are built by corporations to extract data. AIvor is built by a cooperative to serve community.

BLKOUT is a Community Benefit Society — that means:
• One member, one vote — democratic governance
• Your conversations aren't sold to advertisers
• Your data stays within the community
• The technology is collectively owned
• Revenue goes back to the community (75% to creators/community)

Why does this matter for AI?

Because AI trained on our conversations, our questions, our wellness data — that's intimate. That data shouldn't be a product. It should be protected.

AIvor exists because Black queer communities deserve AI that works for them, not on them.

blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #DataSovereignty #CommunityOwned #CooperativeTech #BlackQueerAI #EthicalAI

content.title: AIVOR COMMUNITY-OWNED: Your Data, Your AI

Most AI assistants are built by corporations to extract data. AIvor is different.

BLKOUT is a Community Benefit Society — a cooperative. That means:
🗳 One member, one vote — you have a say in how this works
🔒 Your conversations aren't sold to advertisers
🛡 Your data stays within the community
🤝 The technology is collectively owned
💰 75% of revenue goes back to creators and community

Why does this matter for AI? Because AI trained on our conversations, our wellness check-ins, our questions — that data is intimate. It shouldn't be a product. It should be protected.

AIvor exists because Black queer communities deserve AI that works for them, not on them.

blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #DataSovereignty #CommunityOwned #EthicalAI

content.title: DIGESTVID: Your Weekly Video Roundup
content.content:
Every week, AIvor presents DigestVid — a short video roundup of what's happening in the BLKOUT community.

Events coming up. News highlights. Community wins. All presented by AIvor's avatar.

DigestVid is auto-generated from live platform data — the same data AIvor uses when you chat with him. It's another way to stay connected when you don't have time to browse.

Think of it as your weekly community briefing, presented by an AI who actually knows what's going on.

Watch the latest: blkoutuk.com

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #DigestVid #WeeklyRoundup #BlackQueerMedia #CommunityNews

content.title: TRY AIVOR NOW: Say Hello
content.content:
You've heard what AIvor can do. Now try him.

Go to blkoutuk.com. Click the chat bubble in the bottom right. Say hello.

Ask him:
• "What events are on this week?"
• "Can I do a wellness check-in?"
• "Help me prepare for a job interview"
• "What's new in the community?"
• Or just... chat.

He's real AI. He sees live data. He speaks with a British accent. He knows when to be serious and when to be witty.

He's named after Ivor Cummings — a Black British civil rights pioneer who built institutions for our communities. AIvor carries that legacy forward.

Real AI. Real data. Built for us.

blkoutuk.com?chat=open

#MeetAIvor #BLKOUTTech #BlackQueerAI #TryItNow #CommunityOwned #LiberationTechnology
